description: Create a Java Maven project named 'gs-maven' (groupId: 'org.springframework') in Eclipse that demonstrates the use of the joda-time library. The project must include a package named 'hello' under src/main/java containing two classes: 'Greeter.java' with a 'sayHello()' method returning a greeting, and 'HelloWorld.java' with a main method that displays the current time using joda-time. Ensure the project builds successfully with the files located at src/main/java/hello/HelloWorld.java and src/main/java/hello/Greeter.java.
